case_title: DISPLAY LETTERING AND COPY INC VS CLARKE RICHARD, CEO ROBINSON-CLARKE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DISPLAY LETTERING AND COPY INC AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE RICHARD, CEO ROBINSON-CLARKE INC. ROBINSON CAROL PRESIDENT ROBINSON-CLARKE INC. ROBINSON & CLARKE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ROBINSON CAROL PRESIDENT ROBINSON-CLARKE INC.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLARKE RICHARD, CEO ROBINSON-CLARKE INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISPLAY LETTERING AND COPY INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBINSON & CLARKE, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, AMENDED NAME OF ROBINSON-CLARKE, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
